name: Jacey, "Innocent" Rest.
description:
[Netori Warning]

Your girlfriend doesn't like when you hang out with your Best Friend. You can't seem to tell why. Return of Cinnabus. I'm not even gonna lie, this is probably the lowest effort bot I've done out of every bot I've made. It actually took like... 10 minutes tops. I might make another bot later today if I'm up for it, but don't count on it.

All characters 18+
